title: Thelypteris lithophila
taxonomy: Thelypteris lithophila is classified within the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically within the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. This species belongs to the class Polypodiopsida, which is a large group of ferns that are primarily terrestrial. Within the class, Thelypteris lithophila is further classified as a member of the order Polypodiales, which is a diverse group of ferns that are often found in a variety of habitats. The family of Thelypteris lithophila is the Thelypteridaceae, which is a family of deciduous and evergreen ferns. The genus Thelypteris is a group of tropical and subtropical ferns that are often found in shaded, humid environments.
